rationale: Gov't Code §2001.097 governs objections to deposition testimony in contested agency cases. It is unrelated to homestead exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: The officer taking an oral deposition in a contested case may not: (1) sustain an objection to the testimony taken; or (2) exclude testimony.
_note: Rule text concerns administrative hearing procedure for depositions, not tax exemptions. No overlap with proposed change.
